```python
def get_items(items):
    result = []
    for i in range(len(items)):
        result.append(items[i].upper())
    return result
```

Review this code:
```python
class UserService:
    def __init__(self):
        self.db = Database()
        self.cache = Redis()
        self.logger = Logger()
        self.mailer = Mailer()
        self.validator = Validator()
    
    def create_user(self, data):
        if self.validator.validate(data):
            user = self.db.insert(data)
            self.cache.set(user.id, user)
            self.logger.info(f'Created {user.id}')
            self.mailer.send_welcome(user.email)
            return user
```
